assertions.assertion: Creates a ClaimsPrincipal with a ClaimsIdentity containing a birthdate claim
assertions.rationale: Both tests create a ClaimsPrincipal with a ClaimsIdentity containing a "birthdate" claim.

assertions.assertion: Constructs an AuthorizationHandlerContext with the requirement, user principal, and resource
assertions.rationale: Both tests construct an AuthorizationHandlerContext with the requirement array, user principal, and null resource.

assertions.assertion: Calls HandleAsync on the handler directly
assertions.rationale: Both tests call await _handler.HandleAsync(context) directly on the MinimumAgeHandler instance.

assertions.assertion: Asserts context.HasSucceeded is true for a user meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: UserMeetsAge_Succeeds test uses Assert.True(context.HasSucceeded) for a user born in 1990.

assertions.assertion: Asserts context.HasSucceeded is false for a user not meeting the age requirement
assertions.rationale: UserTooYoung_DoesNotSucceed test uses Assert.False(context.HasSucceeded) for a user born 10 years ago.
